source: live CDP DOM inspection (2026-05-15) on https://www.dabangapp.com/ + /map/onetwo

surfaces_inspected.title: 부동산 필수 앱 다방
surfaces_inspected.meta_description: 원룸, 투룸, 오피스텔, 아파트까지 내가 원하는 방, 다방에 다 있다!

home_anatomy_inferred: 1. Top app bar (logo pink mark / nav links: 지도 · 분양 · 관심목록)
2. Hero search entry (large pill input — 32px radius, location autocomplete)
3. Category card grid (원/투룸 · 아파트 · 주택/빌라 · 오피스텔 · 분양) — H1 20px/700
4. 최근 방문 (recently viewed) — H1 12px/700, small rail
5. 우리동네 한눈에 보기 (neighborhood overview module) — H1 20px/700
6. AI personalized band (관심있는 [동] 주변, AI가 대신 찾아봤어요 🔍) — H1 24px/400 — only emoji + 400-weight head on the page; the AI feature breaks the 700-bold default deliberately
7. Promo / value-prop panel (deep slate bg rgb(67,77,104) at 0.4 alpha overlay)
map_surface_anatomy: 1. Sticky top nav with category tabs (원/투룸 · 아파트 · 주택/빌라 · 오피스텔 · 분양)
2. Filter chip strip (rounded 42px pills with 1px gray-400 border, weight-500 labels)
3. Map canvas (Naver / proprietary tile renderer) — dominant surface
4. Floating left listing rail (cards, gray-400 borders, no shadow)
5. Map markers (pill-shaped price markers using --blue-500 for selected / --gray-700 for default)
layout_observations: Map canvas dominates ~70% of viewport on /map/onetwo — chrome is borders, not shadows
Filter chips use 42px pill radius (rare in cohort) — Zigbang ships 10px chips, Dabang ships full-pill
Search-entry pill on home uses 32px radius — readable as a single 'one big input' moment
No box-shadow anywhere — depth strictly via 1px gray-400 borders and tinted backgrounds (blue-50 hover)
Headings refuse a single scale: 12 / 18 / 20 / 24px co-exist within the home page — sections lean on weight + position, not size, for hierarchy
AI band H1 is 24px/400 (lightest large heading) — the company signals 'AI is conversational, not headline-shouty' typographically
page_weight: single-page React (Next.js inferred from app router patterns); /brand and /design routes both 200 but return the SPA shell (no real DS page)
